description: AI-powered desktop browser with built-in agentic assistant by Perplexity AI.
pre_install: # The Comet installer is a Flutter-based NSIS self-extractor that installs to %LOCALAPPDATA%.
# Scoop cannot control this installation path. This manifest runs the installer silently
# and waits for the application to appear at the expected location.
# Wait for the actual application to appear (up to 2 minutes)
throw "Comet installation did not complete. The installer may require interactive installation."

script: $uninstallPath = Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\Perplexity\Comet\Application\*\Installer\setup.exe" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty FullName
Write-Host 'Native uninstaller not found. Please uninstall from Settings > Apps.'

notes: Perplexity Comet is an AI-powered browser by Perplexity AI.
Note: Comet installs to %LOCALAPPDATA%\Perplexity\Comet\ outside of Scoop's control.
The Scoop app directory only stores the installer and manifest.
